text:
Hey <@&1424461167883194418>, here's what shipped this week.

## Weekly Update - 2026-06-28

🎵 **Audio Infrastructure**
We did a lot of audio plumbing.
- **Stable Audio 3**: Added via Stability's official API, plus Stable Audio 3 Medium via fal. Model cards now reflect flat-rate per-gen pricing.
- **ElevenLabs**: Upgraded to `music_v2` (now supporting reference-audio conditioning). We also added SFX and Multilingual v2 support, and corrected the TTS pricing.

🪙 **Quests > Tiers**
Subscriptions are out. Quests are in.
- The quest system is officially live with a public catalog, rewards ledger, and dashboard worker.
- All tier and drip copy has been scrubbed from the docs. You earn Pollen by doing things now. We've added specific checks for Polar top-ups and split the legacy/launch top-up quests.

🧠 **Models & Docs**
- **New Model**: Added `inception-mercury`.
- **Multimodal**: Fixed an issue passing text modalities to providers, so multimodal inputs are fully unblocked.
- **Community**: Added REKTY AI to the bot list.
- **Auth Docs**: Publishable keys are dead. We've updated the authentication docs to fully document the BYOP (Bring Your Own Pollen) replacement.

Go build something noisy.
